ExternalReference.description: A wrapper object with fields that allow reference to a Toast platform entity by Toast GUID or a partner's identifier.

externalId.description: External identifier string that is prefixed by the naming authority. You can use the orders API to set an `externalId` for an order and then GET the order with that `externalId`.

ExternalReference.name: ExternalReference

Refund.description: A currency amount removed from a guest payment.

refundAmount.description: The amount of the refund, excluding the tip.

tipRefundAmount.description: The amount of the tip refund.

refundDate.description: The date and time when the refund was made.

refundBusinessDate.description: The business date (yyyyMMdd) on which this refund was created. Response only.

refundTransaction.description: An identifier for the refund transaction. You can use the identifier to associate items and service charges that were refunded in the same transaction.

Refund.name: Refund

allOf.description: An identifier for the refund transaction. You can use the identifier to associate items and service charges that were refunded in the same transaction.

VoidInformation.description: Information about a void applied to a check or item.

voidUser.description: The user who voided the order.

voidApprover.description: The user who approved the void.

voidDate.description: The date on which the void was made.

voidBusinessDate.description: The business date (yyyyMMdd) on which the void was made. Response only.

voidReason.description: A reference to the configured void reason for the void.

VoidInformation.name: VoidInformation

Device.description:
The *Device ID* value that the Toast platform assigns to a specific Toast POS device.

The `id` value is a unique identifier for a device.

To find the ID for a Toast POS device, from the overflow  menu (⋮) select *Device Status* and then select the *Device* tab.

id.description: The physical id of the device

Device.name: Device
